violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a plastic container in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Equipment was removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Raw animal foods (such as fish and shrimp) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as rice and risotto) in the grill cooler drawer. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Food items were rearranged during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

The floor in the basement storage area has an accumulation of droppings, soil residue and food debris under the storage shelves. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. At time of inspection lobster was observed placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic lobster crates. Lobsters were divided onto sheet pans and smaller containers during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

Plastic lobster crates containing cooked lobsters were observed in contact with stagnant water on ground at exterior of establishment. Adulterated foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Person in Charge needs to apply for Food Safety Manager License. Application was provided. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

Shellstock located in the Walk-in did not have the proper identification tags. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. Tags were located and placed with items during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

Soft Cheeses slices and wrapped in walk-in were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023

The painted flooring in the kitchen at cook line, dish machine were observed in poor repair. Concrete was exposed where paint has worn off The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/02/2023
